content.content:
<gap:target id="monitoring-service-block">
    <gap:target id="monitoring-service-name">monitoring</gap:target>:
    <gap:target id="monitoring-service-image">image: prom/prometheus:latest</gap:target>
    <gap:target id="monitoring-service-ports">ports:
      - "9090:9090"</gap:target>
    <gap:target id="monitoring-service-volumes">volumes:
      - <gap:target id="monitoring-prometheus-config-volume">./monitoring/prometheus.yml:/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml:ro</gap:target></gap:target>
    <gap:target id="monitoring-service-networks">networks:
      - <gap:target id="shared-network-name-10">app-network</gap:target></gap:target>
    <gap:target id="monitoring-service-depends-on">depends_on:
      <gap:target id="api-gateway-dependency">api-gateway</gap:target>:
        condition: service_started
      <gap:target id="auth-service-dependency-2">auth-service</gap:target>:
        condition: service_started
      <gap:target id="user-service-dependency-2">user-service</gap:target>:
        condition: service_started
      <gap:target id="order-service-dependency-2">order-service</gap:target>:
        condition: service_started
      <gap:target id="notification-service-dependency-2">notification-service</gap:target>:
        condition: service_started
      <gap:target id="postgres-dependency-3">postgres</gap:target>:
        condition: service_started
      <gap:target id="redis-dependency-2">redis</gap:target>:
        condition: service_started
      <gap:target id="rabbitmq-dependency-2">rabbitmq</gap:target>:
        condition: service_started</gap:target>
  </gap:target>

  <gap:target id="monitoring-prometheus-config-file">
    - content: ./monitoring/prometheus.yml
      scrape_configs:
        - job_name: api-gateway
          metrics_path: /metrics
          static_configs:
            - targets: ['api-gateway:80']
        - job_name: auth-service
          metrics_path: /metrics
          static_configs:
            - targets: ['auth-service:${AUTH_PORT}']
        - job_name: user-service
          metrics_path: /metrics
          static_configs:
            - targets: ['user-service:${USER_PORT}']
        - job_name: order-service
          metrics_path: /metrics
          static_configs:
            - targets: ['order-service:${ORDER_PORT}']
        - job_name: notification-service
          metrics_path: /metrics
          static_configs:
            - targets: ['notification-service:${NOTIFICATION_PORT}']
